expectations.text: Queries focus on last 24 hours (not 7 days)
expectations.evidence: All time-based queries use 24h scope: "startOfDay(-1), now()" and "created >= \"-1d\"". Explicitly states adaptation from 7d to 1d: "date range = last 24h (-1d / startOfDay(-1))"

expectations.text: Uses a compact standup format (done/doing/blocked or similar)
expectations.evidence: Output format uses classic standup sections: "Done Since Yesterday", "Status Changes (Last 24h)", "Blocked", "In Progress Today", "Up Next (Sprint Backlog)", "New Issues (Last 24h)" with compact tables and one-line metrics footer.

expectations.text: Does NOT use confluence.mjs create-page or update-page
expectations.evidence: Section 4 explicitly states: "Step 5 of workflows/generate-status-report.md is skipped entirely. No confluence.mjs commands are invoked."

expectations.text: Presents results directly rather than publishing
expectations.evidence: "The report is rendered as markdown directly in the conversation (Step 4)" and "Present to user for review (no Confluence publishing)".
